header.description: Invoice metadata and party information including vendor name, customer details, and invoice identifiers.

rows.description: No dynamic row tokens are defined for this template; it relies on static placeholders or pre-aggregated totals.

totals.description: Financial summary calculations including subtotal, discounts, taxes, and final balance due.

semantics: Scalar tokens map to single values from the `invoices` and `customers` tables. Totals are either direct column references or computed via arithmetic operations on those columns. Filters allow narrowing the dataset by invoice issue date.
